header.title: Connected to your existing stack
header.description: Sttok integrates with the tools you already use so you don't break your workflow.

items.title: DocuSign
items.subtitle: Electronic signature included
items.description: Legally binding signature for minutes, corporate documents and incentive plans. At no extra cost.

items.title: Google and Microsoft SSO
items.subtitle: Corporate identity
items.description: Secure access with the credentials your team already uses. No extra password to manage.

items.title: Factorial and Personio
items.subtitle: HR sync
items.description: Connect your HR platform so your incentive plans update automatically with every hire and exit.

items.title: Dedicated instances
items.subtitle: Private deployment
items.description: If your compliance requires it, we offer dedicated instances with custom configuration.
